title: Global EV Sales Surge 38% in Q1 2026
summary: Electric vehicle adoption accelerates across key markets as battery costs continue to fall, pushing manufacturers to expand EV lineups ahead of regulatory deadlines.

title: Supply Chain Disruptions Ease for Semiconductor Components
summary: Automotive-grade chip supply stabilises after two years of shortages, enabling production ramp-ups at major OEMs and improved delivery timelines to distributors.

title: New Emissions Standards Take Effect in Europe from 2027
summary: The EU's revised CO2 fleet targets will require manufacturers to further reduce average emissions, accelerating the transition away from combustion engines.

title: Fleet Management Software Market to Reach $52B by 2030
summary: Growing demand for real-time vehicle tracking and predictive maintenance platforms is driving rapid growth in the fleet management software sector.

title: Luxury Segment Outperforms on Strong Demand from Asia-Pacific
summary: Premium and luxury vehicle categories report record order books as demand from China, South Korea and Australia offsets softer European volumes.

title: Autonomous Driving Regulations Advance in Five US States
summary: Regulatory frameworks for Level 3 and Level 4 autonomous systems gain traction, with manufacturers and distributors preparing compliance plans for new certification requirements.
